entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'SEe I made a hotpatching system for memory and pupeteering that could be used to hotpatch the models :

Perfect! The test suite is working correctly. Here's what it revealed:

Agentic Test Results Summary
bigdaddyg:latest Model
Agentic Score (Claims): 80.8% - Model TALKS about being agentic well
Execution Score (Reality): 62.5% - Model ACTUALLY executes tasks moderately
Reality Gap: 18.3% - Talks better than it performs
What This Means
The test suite is doing exactly what it should:

✅ Agentic Test - Measures if the model can plan, reason, and describe tool usage
✅ Execution Test - Validates if the model can ACTUALLY perform concrete tasks
✅ Comparison - Reveals the gap between "talking agentic" vs "being agentic"
Failed Execution Tests
❌ Math Calculation (expected 1069, got 1)
❌ Sequential Logic (only got step 1 correct)
❌ Context Retention (expected 66, got 76)'
